seo.title: Platform Features - VoiceAI
seo.description: Explore VoiceAI's core capabilities: intelligent speech recognition, natural language understanding, emotion detection, multilingual support, real-time analytics, and knowledge base integration.

hero.title: Everything You Need to Build Intelligent Voice Agents
hero.subtitle: Our comprehensive platform delivers six core capabilities that power natural, efficient, and intelligent voice interactions at enterprise scale.

capabilities.title: Core Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Six pillars of our voice AI platform

speechRecognition.title: Intelligent Speech Recognition
speechRecognition.description: State-of-the-art ASR engine with 99.5% accuracy across diverse accents, dialects, and noisy environments. Supports real-time streaming and batch processing.

nlu.title: Natural Language Understanding
nlu.description: Deep semantic parsing powered by fine-tuned LLMs. Understands intent, entities, context, and nuance across multi-turn conversations.

emotionDetection.title: Emotion Recognition
emotionDetection.description: Real-time sentiment and emotion analysis from vocal tone, speech patterns, and linguistic cues. Adapt responses dynamically based on caller mood.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Native support for 50+ languages and regional dialects. Automatic language detection and seamless mid-conversation language switching.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: Live dashboards tracking call metrics, resolution rates, sentiment trends, and agent performance. Export reports and set custom alerts.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base Integration
knowledgeBase.description: Connect your internal knowledge bases, FAQs, and documentation. RAG-powered retrieval ensures accurate, up-to-date responses every time.

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.subtitle: From voice input to intelligent response in milliseconds

step1.title: Voice Capture
step1.description: High-fidelity audio capture with noise cancellation and echo suppression.

step2.title: Speech-to-Text
step2.description: Real-time ASR converts speech to text with punctuation and speaker diarization.

step3.title: Intent & Entity Extraction
step3.description: NLU engine parses meaning, identifies intent, and extracts key entities.

step4.title: Intelligent Response
step4.description: LLM generates contextual responses, retrieves knowledge, and triggers actions.

cta.title: Experience Every Feature First-Hand
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial and explore the full platform with no limitations.

seo.title: Technology Architecture - VoiceAI
seo.description: Discover VoiceAI's technology stack: foundation LLMs, streaming pipeline, neural TTS engine, ultra-low-latency architecture, and distributed deployment.

hero.title: Built for Performance, Designed for Scale
hero.subtitle: Our technology stack combines cutting-edge AI models with a high-performance infrastructure engineered for enterprise-grade reliability and speed.

foundationModel.title: Foundation LLM Engine
foundationModel.description: Fine-tuned large language models optimized for voice conversations. Supports GPT-4o, Claude, and custom models with voice-specific instruction tuning.

streaming.title: Streaming Pipeline
streaming.description: End-to-end streaming architecture processes audio in real-time. Chunked processing with overlap ensures zero-gap conversation flow.

ttsEngine.title: Neural TTS Engine
ttsEngine.description: Next-generation text-to-speech with 100+ voices, 12 emotion presets, and HD 48kHz output. Clone custom voices with just 30 seconds of audio.

lowLatency.title: Ultra-Low-Latency Architecture
lowLatency.description: Edge computing nodes worldwide ensure sub-200ms end-to-end latency. Intelligent request routing minimizes round-trip times.

distributed.title: Distributed Deployment
distributed.description: Kubernetes-native microservices with auto-scaling. Multi-cloud support across AWS, GCP, and Azure with 99.99% uptime SLA.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.subtitle: A high-level view of our distributed voice AI pipeline

layers.ingress: Ingress Layer — Load balancing, TLS termination, rate limiting
layers.processing: Processing Layer — ASR, NLU, LLM orchestration, TTS
layers.data: Data Layer — Vector store, conversation memory, analytics
layers.infra: Infrastructure — K8s, observability, CI/CD, secrets management

cta.title: See the Technology in Action
cta.subtitle: Schedule a technical deep-dive with our engineering team.

seo.title: Security & Compliance - VoiceAI
seo.description: VoiceAI's enterprise security: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, GDPR compliant. TLS 1.3, AES-256 encryption, RBAC, audit logging, and more.

hero.title: Enterprise-Grade Security You Can Trust
hero.subtitle: We protect your data with industry-leading security practices, comprehensive compliance certifications, and transparent audit processes.

soc2.name: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: Annual third-party audit covering security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy controls.

hipaa.name: HIPAA
hipaa.description: Full HIPAA compliance for handling protected health information in healthcare voice AI deployments.

gdpr.name: GDPR
gdpr.description: Complete GDPR compliance including data subject rights, consent management, and cross-border transfer safeguards.

iso27001.name: ISO 27001
iso27001.description: Certified information security management system covering all aspects of our platform operations.

encryption.title: Data Encryption
encryption.subtitle: End-to-end protection at every layer
items: TLS 1.3 for all data in transit
AES-256 encryption for data at rest
Hardware Security Modules (HSM) for key management

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.subtitle: Granular permissions and identity management
items: Role-based access control (RBAC) with custom roles
SSO integration via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect

auditLog.title: Audit & Monitoring
auditLog.subtitle: Complete visibility into every action
items: Immutable audit logs for all platform actions
Quarterly penetration testing by third parties

cta.title: Need a Security Review?
cta.subtitle: Our security team is ready to walk you through our practices and certifications.
